case_title: GERAILTON PINTO VS. AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PINTO, GERAILTON AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINTO, GERAILTON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINTO, GERAILTON AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE SERVED APR-18-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINTO, GERAILTON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF GERAILTON PINTO IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY ROBERTO DELIMA, CERTIFIED PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION CENTER IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY LENIN RODRIQUEZ, CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
